steps.title: How it work
steps.step1.title: Get an Estimate to Plan
steps.step1.desc: Fill in your shipment details and receive a competitive, customized quote within 24 hours.
steps.step2.title: Ongoing Expert Support
steps.step2.desc: Our dedicated account managers guide you through every step — customs, routing, and documentation.
steps.step3.title: Relax While We Move
steps.step3.desc: Sit back while MH Cargo handles your cargo from pickup to final delivery, anywhere in the world.
services.air.desc: Express air solutions when speed is non-negotiable: priority-skip package available for urgent imports and critical export deadlines worldwide.
services.air.title: Time-Critical Air Cargo.
services.road.desc: Daily departures connecting Morocco and Europe. Port clearance, last-mile delivery to multiple EU and outsourced products.
services.road.title: International Road Transport.
services.sea.desc: Cost effective shipping to Casablanca and Tangier Med. Comprehensive FCL and LCL management for high-volume trade.
services.sea.title: Global Ocean Solutions.
services.storage.desc: Secure, flexible warehousing solutions in strategic Moroccan locations. Short-term and long-term storage fully integrated with our freight services.
services.storage.title: Secure Storage & Warehousing.
action-box.text: Feel free to reach out and ask us anything!
service-contact.heading: For additional information contact one of our agents
